# Q1: Generated manifest and backup copies

## Finding 1: Generated filesystem manifest checked in
- File/lines: `packages/tooling/jskit/packages/web-shell-host/templates/src/shell/generated/filesystemManifest.generated.js:1`
- Source of truth should be: filesystem under `packages/tooling/jskit/packages/web-shell-host/templates/src/pages/**` and `.../src/surfaces/**` (via generator script)
- Shadow copy exists: committed generated manifest file
- Why risky: The generated file can become stale if the generator is not re-run; mismatched routes in UI/CLI.
- Suggested refactor: Generate at build/CI time, avoid committing the artifact, or enforce regeneration on change.

## Finding 2: Capability contracts backup file committed
- File/lines: `packages/tooling/jskit/contracts/capabilities/index.mjs.bak-20260228-121719:1`
- Source of truth should be: `packages/tooling/jskit/contracts/capabilities/index.mjs`
- Shadow copy exists: backup `.bak` file in repo
- Why risky: Readers or scripts may accidentally use the stale backup; contributes to drift and confusion.
- Suggested refactor: Remove from repo or move to a gitignored backup location.
